tool.name: create_autofix_pr
tool.description:
Create a git branch with remediation commits (one per finding) and open a PR via `gh` CLI.
Each finding dict must include: finding_id, title, severity, patch_diff (unified diff applied via git apply). Requires `gh` CLI authenticated against the repo's remote. Returns PR URL on success.

parameter.name: repo_path
parameter.description: Path to the git repo (abs or /workspace/ relative).

parameter.name: findings
parameter.description: List of {finding_id, title, severity, patch_diff} dicts.
